edgeCases: No active workflows -> empty Features + honest empty-state panel
Nil *workflow.Workflow in Active slice skipped, not dereferenced
Zero/future StartedAt clamps AgeDays to 0; floor-days otherwise
Nil roadmap -> Present:false; empty present roadmap -> 0/0 done
Backlog/Baseline phases excluded from burn-down (mirrors Summary())
Non-gate-failure events excluded; empty Gate buckets under '<none>'
Gate ranking matches insights.Gates verbatim (count desc, key asc)
Compute deterministic: same Inputs -> identical Dashboard
Read-only purity: no I/O, no git in aggregator; command writes no files
JSON mode emits stable top-level fields Features/Roadmap/Gates, ANSI-free
